name: Sunblast3000FC
comment: Sunblast 3000FC is an exceptionally powerful IP65 graphic strobe, blinder and flood. Available in white or full colour versions and designed to deliver simply staggering light levels, this versatile fixture can provide an unbelievable punch over a huge area.
